mapper.select:
SELECT a.*, b.name AS dept_name, c.name AS inst_name FROM sys_user a LEFT JOIN sys_inst c ON a.inst_id = c.inst_id AND c.newlevel=0 LEFT JOIN sys_dept b ON a.dept_id = b.dept_id AND b.newlevel=0
JOIN ( SELECT d.* FROM sys_dept d WHERE d.dept_id=#{deptId} OR d.parent_id=#{deptId} ) dd ON a.dept_id=dd.dept_id AND dd.newlevel = 0
WHERE 1=1 AND a.is_deleted=0
AND a.login_name LIKE #{user.loginName} || '%'
AND a.code LIKE #{user.code} || '%'
AND a.name LIKE #{user.name} || '%'
AND a.dept_id = #{user.deptId}
AND a.inst_id = #{user.instId}
AND a.state IN
#{item}
ORDER BY a.create_time DESC

SELECT a.*, b.name AS dept_name, c.name AS inst_name, c.inst_no, m.perms AS default_menu FROM sys_user a LEFT JOIN sys_inst c ON a.inst_id = c.inst_id AND c.newlevel = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_dept b ON a.dept_id = b.dept_id AND b.newlevel = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_menu_default md ON a.user_id = md.user_id AND md.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_menu m ON m.menu_id = md.menu_id AND m.is_deleted = 0 WHERE 1 = 1 AND a.is_deleted = 0 AND a.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT a.*, b.name AS dept_name, c.name AS inst_name FROM sys_user a LEFT JOIN sys_dept b ON a.dept_id = b.dept_id LEFT JOIN sys_inst c ON a.inst_id = c.inst_id WHERE a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', CONCAT(#{thinkString}, '%')) OR a.login_name LIKE CONCAT('%', CONCAT(#{thinkString}, '%')) OR a.user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', CONCAT(#{thinkString}, '%'))

SELECT * FROM sys_user a JOIN ( SELECT user_id FROM sys_role_user WHERE role_id = (SELECT role_id FROM sys_role WHERE inst_id = #{instId} AND NAME = #{roleName} AND is_deleted = 0 ) AND is_deleted = 0 ) b ON a.user_id = b.user_id WHERE a.dept_id = #{deptId} AND a.is_deleted = 0

SELECT a.login_name, a.name, b.name AS dept_name, c.name AS inst_name, a.code, CASE a.sex WHEN 1 THEN '男' ELSE '女' END AS sex, a.phone, a.email FROM sys_user a LEFT JOIN sys_dept b ON a.dept_id = b.dept_id LEFT JOIN sys_inst c ON a.inst_id = c.inst_id WHERE a.is_deleted = 0
SELECT a.*, a.login_name, c.inst_no FROM sys_user a LEFT JOIN sys_inst c ON a.inst_id = c.inst_id AND c.newlevel=0
